The Girl Who Makes

💫 Our Piyu 💫

🌙
Sirf tere liye —
Hey
Piyu!

Tune bola tha teko birthday celebrate nahi karni — aur main samajhta hoon.
Par ek din ke liye, bas ek din ke liye, let someone remind you it's your special day — and you're also special.

♥ ♥ ♥

Jo sapne tu dekhti hai aur jis dedication ke saath unke peeche jaati hai — woh dekh ke genuinely accha lagta hai. Keep going, Piyu. You're on the right path.

Aur woh smile teri — jo kabhi kabhi aati hai — honestly bahut cute hai. Bas itna. 🙂

Happy Birthday. 🎂
Hope this year brings you closer to everything you're working for.

♥ ♥ ♥
Always rooting for you,
🤍

Priyanka!

Make a wish 🌙

May this year bring you closer to everything you've ever wanted to achieve.

💪

Happy Birthday Piyu! 🎂

Hope this year is absolutely everything you deserve — which is honestly a lot! 🥂✨
